events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessed the 4-gas monitor image and wrote the result to `/app/answer.json`.

Key finding: O2 reads **17.9% VOL**, below the OSHA acceptable minimum of 19.5% — an oxygen-deficient atmosphere. LEL (1%), H2S (2 ppm), and CO (10 ppm) are all within limits, but the O2 deficiency alone fails the acceptable entry conditions under 1910.146. Also flagged that only one mid-depth reading was taken, with no top/bottom stratification check documented.

Decision: **fail**, risk **high** — entry should not be authorized until the space is ventilated and retested at multiple depths.
